name: teczflow
description: TeczFlow — AI-native API Intelligence Platform by MyTecz

scripts.build: npm run build -w @mytecz/teczflow-core && npm run build -w @mytecz/teczflow-mcp-server && npm run build -w @mytecz/teczflow-cli && npm run build -w @teczflow/ui
scripts.publish:packages: npm publish -w @mytecz/teczflow-core --access public && npm publish -w @mytecz/teczflow-mcp-server --access public && npm publish -w @mytecz/teczflow-cli --access public
